Fantastic Preys and Where to Find Them

Introduction to Title IX

Title IX is a federal law that prohibits sex-based discrimination in any school or education program receiving federal funding. Understanding its implications through a computational lens can reveal insights and promote gender equality.

list of impactful events of sexual abuse cases, most of which happened in Asia, under educational circumstances
